features.Key Features: Model: GVM LS-P80S | LED Beads: COB daylight Led bead | CRI: 97 + | TLCI: 97+ | Beam Angle: 120° | Power: 90W | AC Adapter: DC30V/ 3A | Input voltage: 100-240V | Color temperature: 5600K | Lumen: 3100lux @ 1m,12000lux @ 0.5m (Bare Light), 9600lux @ 1m, 51000lux @ 0.5m
